records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker who is exactly 41 years old and has course arrangements?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id
FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.Age = '41'
  AND teacher.Name = 'Anne Walker'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course_arrange
    WHERE course_arrange.Teacher_ID = teacher.Teacher_ID
  )

records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker from Little Lever Urban District who is exactly 41 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker' AND teacher.age = '41'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT teacher.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher
WHERE Hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District'
  AND Name = 'Anne Walker'
  AND Age = '41'

records.question: Who is Anne Walker from Little Lever Urban District, aged 41, teaching students in grade 7 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND course_arrange.grade >= 7 AND teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id
FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.Age = '41'

  AND teacher.Name = 'Anne Walker'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course_arrange
    WHERE course_arrange.Teacher_ID = teacher.Teacher_ID
      AND course_arrange.Grade >= 7
  )

records.question: Which teachers who are exactly 26 years old have courses assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE teacher.age = '26'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id
FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.age = '26'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course_arrange
    JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
    WHERE course_arrange.teacher_id = teacher.teacher_id
)

records.question: Which teachers named Lucy Wong, aged 39 and from Turton Urban District, teach Music courses at grade 4 or below?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE course.course = 'Music' AND course_arrange.grade <= 4 AND teacher.name = 'Lucy Wong' AND teacher.hometown = 'Turton Urban District' AND teacher.age = '39'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id
FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.Name = 'Lucy Wong'
  AND teacher.Hometown = 'Turton Urban District'
  AND teacher.Age = '39'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course_arrange
    WHERE course_arrange.Teacher_ID = teacher.Teacher_ID
      AND course_arrange.Grade <= 4
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM course
        WHERE course.Course_ID = course_arrange.Course_ID
          AND course.Course = 'Music'
      )
  )
